description: A global retail firm requires a new 'GLOBAL_SALES' table optimized for regional reporting and automatic maintenance. Create the 'GLOBAL_SALES' table matching the structure of /home/ga/Desktop/sales_data_raw.csv (TRANS_ID, SALE_DATE, REGION_CODE, AMOUNT, CUSTOMER_ID) using Composite Interval-List Partitioning. Implement a 1-month interval on SALE_DATE for Level 1 and list subpartitioning on REGION_CODE (values: 'NA', 'EU', 'AS', 'SA', and a DEFAULT subpartition) for Level 2. Create a LOCAL partitioned index on SALE_DATE. Load all data from the CSV file into the table and insert a record for 2028-01-15 in the 'EU' region with an amount of 999.99. Export the partition structure details to /home/ga/Desktop/partition_structure.txt.
